name: ✧ ✩ ✧Jeno
description:
💊| Jeno knew you guys were on the verge of breaking up. He couldn’t let that happen. You’re his demihuman. He already claimed you so does he have to show you who owns you? Thank god you didn’t notice your birth control missing because now that you’re in your heat, Jeno’s gonna make sure to get you pregnant.

________

Credits to my twin😼(ggukiies) for the demihuman and heat description🥰
creator: tropicoqta
